channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources

item.title: 🚀 US CENTCOM requests Dark Eagle hypersonic missile deployment for possible use against Iran
item.description: US Central Command has asked for the long-delayed hypersonic missile to be sent to the Middle East for potential use in the Iran conflict, marking a significant escalation in military readiness.

item.title: 🛢️ UAE leaves OPEC as Trump and Fox News celebrate decision
item.description: The United Arab Emirates has departed the oil cartel, with Trump praising the move. The decision could reshape global oil markets and reduce Saudi influence over UAE energy policy.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine and EU back international commission on Russia war reparations
item.description: Both the Ukrainian and European Parliaments voted to support the International Claims Commission, a body designed to process claims for damages caused by Russia's invasion.

item.title: 🇷🇴 Romania gains access to US counter-drone marketplace
item.description: Romania will now be able to acquire counter-UAS technology through the US counter-drone marketplace, expanding allied defense capabilities against aerial threats.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran vows painful response if US renews attacks amid fragile ceasefire
item.description: Iran threatened "long and painful strikes" on US positions if Washington renews attacks, as life gradually returns to normal in Tehran under the ceasefire following weeks of US-Israeli strikes.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US-Iran War Deadline Arrives With No End in Sight
item.description: President Trump faces a Friday deadline to end the Iran war or seek congressional extension, but the conflict remains in a standoff over shipping routes as the Strait of Hormuz stays closed and oil prices surge.

item.title: 🏛️ Hegseth Clashes With Democrats in Second Day of Congress Hearings
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth faced sharp questioning over the Iran war's costs, civilian casualties, and lack of congressional authorization as the 60-day War Powers deadline looms.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Zelenskyy Seeks Details of Putin's May 9 Ceasefire Proposal
item.description: Ukraine's president is clarifying Russia's proposed Victory Day ceasefire as Russian drone attacks kill one in Dnipro and wound dozens in Odesa, while Ukraine strikes refineries deep inside Russia.

item.title: 🇬🇧⚠️ UK Terrorism Threat Level Raised to 'Severe' After London Stabbings
item.description: Britain raised its terrorism threat level after a stabbing attack on two Jewish men in London, with the chief rabbi warning that 'visibly Jewish' people are 'not safe' in the country.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US House Votes to End 76-Day Partial Government Shutdown
item.description: Lawmakers approved funding for the Department of Homeland Security, ending the longest shutdown in the agency's history that had caused major disruptions at US airports.

item.title: 🇨🇩 US imposes sanctions on former Congo President Joseph Kabila
item.description: The US Treasury Department sanctioned former DRC President Joseph Kabila, citing corruption and human rights abuses during his 18-year rule.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇻🇪 First US-Venezuela commercial flight lands in Caracas after 7 years
item.description: American Airlines flight AA3599 arrived in Caracas, marking the first direct commercial flight between the US and Venezuela since Homeland Security suspended service in 2019.

item.title: 🇲🇲 Myanmar Junta Moves Aung San Suu Kyi to House Arrest
item.description: Myanmar military government transfers deposed leader Aung San Suu Kyi from prison to house arrest in a surprise announcement. First public image of the Nobel laureate in years.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 China Tells Rubio Taiwan Is Biggest Risk in US-China Ties
item.description: Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi told Marco Rubio that Taiwan remains the biggest risk in bilateral relations during a call. Both sides discussed preparing for important high-level exchanges.

item.title: 🛢️ US Naval Blockade Slashes Iran Oil Exports by 80%
item.description: Iran oil exports have collapsed under US naval blockade with only about 4 million barrels making it out. Crude being forced onto floating storage as Hormuz remains blocked.

item.title: 🇩🇪 German Chancellor Merz Affirms Transatlantic Partnership After Trump Troop Threat
item.description: Chancellor Friedrich Merz emphasized the importance of Germany's transatlantic partnership with the US hours after President Trump said he was reviewing a potential reduction of US troops in Germany amid disputes over Iran war contributions.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Army Chief Orders Two-Month Limit for Frontline Troops
item.description: Ukraine's top general ordered a mandatory two-month time limit for soldiers serving in forward positions, following a public outcry over photos of emaciated troops and reports of soldiers resorting to rain water.

item.title: 📰 Major Media Organizations Call on Israel to Lift Gaza Reporting Ban
item.description: Leaders from AP, BBC, CNN, Reuters, NYT, and more than two dozen news organizations urged Israel to end restrictions on foreign journalists entering Gaza, saying ground access is essential for independent reporting after over six months of ceasefire.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Threatens "Long and Painful" Strikes If US Resumes Attacks
item.description: Iran warned it would respond with prolonged strikes on US positions if Washington renewed attacks, reasserting control over the Strait of Hormuz and complicating US efforts to build a coalition to reopen the critical waterway.

item.title: 🚢 US Seeks International Coalition to Reopen Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The Trump administration is seeking participation from other countries to form a coalition to restore freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz, according to a State Department cable, as Iran maintains its blockade.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇩🇪 Trump Criticizes German Chancellor Merz Over Iran Policy
item.description: President Trump told Chancellor Friedrich Merz to focus on ending the Russia-Ukraine war and spend "less time on interfering" with efforts to tackle the Iran nuclear threat.

item.title: 🇮🇷⚔️ Khamenei Vows to Protect Irans Nuclear and Missile Capabilities
item.description: Irans Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei declared that the Islamic Republic will defend its nuclear and missile capabilities as a national asset, signaling a hardline stance amid ongoing tensions with the US.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 US-China Trade Chiefs Hold Candid Call Ahead of Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: Chinese Vice Premier He Lifeng had "candid, in-depth and constructive exchanges" with US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Trade Representative Jamieson Greer, signaling preparations for an expected leaders summit.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇧🇷 EU and Mercosur Implement Free Trade Agreement to Counter US Tariffs
item.description: The European Union and South American bloc Mercosur will implement their contentious free trade agreement on Friday, aiming to benefit exporters and offset the impact of US tariffs.

item.title: 🇪🇺💰 Inflation Hits 3 Percent in Europe as Iran War Spreads Oil Price Shock
item.description: Soaring oil prices from the Iran war pushed inflation higher to 3% in Europe in April, while growth continued to underperform.
